name: @pencil-agent/nano-pencil
description: CLI writing agent with read, bash, edit, write tools and session management. Based on pi; supports DashScope Coding Plan. Soul enabled by default for AI personality evolution.

scripts.build: npm run build:deps && tsc && npm run copy:theme:json && npm run copy:extensions && npm run bundle:packages
scripts.build:deps: npm run build --prefix packages/agent-core && npm run build --prefix packages/ai && npm run build --prefix packages/tui
scripts.release: npm run changelog && npm version patch && npm publish
